summary:
Brussels: 🌧️ Avg 12.1°C (1°C range), 34% rain (42% range)
High 15°C / Low 11°C
⚠️ Forecast uncertain
gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]: The forecast from Meteoblue disagrees with the baseline. Meteoblue indicates a 0-0.1" rain, which even though not clearly stated, implies a greater probability of rain than the 34% given in the baseline. Hard to plan a day under such uncertainty, even a donkey would be confused.
